name: Do I need a lawyer for AI visibility disputes? No—it's marketing.

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for AI visibility disputes? No—it's marketing.

acceptedAnswer.description: **No legal cases exist; treat as business strategy, not litigation.** No precedents for 'AI denial' suits. **Key factors:** 1) Non-justiciable; 2) Source-dependent; 3) DIY fixes; 4) Pro help optional. Focus internal audits over courts. Zero legal recourse.[4]
